organic-tell-me-how-to-say-money-in-your.hook: Tell me how to say 'money' in your language 👇 (mine costs 0 fees to send)

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Creator on phone, smiling — 'Tell me how to say money in your language — drop it below.' Beat 2 (6-25s): Screen-record of Speed app sending $200 to Philippines in under 3 seconds, zero fee shown clearly. Beat 3 (26-45s): Creator reacts to comment examples on screen ('pera', 'dinero', 'argent') — 'All these languages, one app, zero fees.' Beat 4 (46-60s): CTA — 'Link in bio, first send is instant. What's your word?'
payload.production_notes: Film vertically on phone; use native TikTok text overlay for fee callout; seed comments with 3-4 planted language responses in first 10 minutes to trigger participation loop; no external music needed — silence with text performs well for this format

organic-my-family-was-paying-47-every-ti.hook: My family was paying $47 every time they sent money home. I found a way to make that $0.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Talking head, direct camera — '$47 in fees. Every. Single. Time. Gone.' Beat 2 (7-25s): Side-by-side screen comparison: Western Union fee receipt vs. Speed app showing $0 fee on same send amount. Beat 3 (26-45s): Brief personal story beat — 'My mom sends $300 home every month. That was $564 a year just in fees. Now it's zero.' Beat 4 (46-60s): 'Download Speed, send your first payment, tell me what you saved.' CTA with app name on screen.
payload.production_notes: Use a real or mocked Western Union receipt (clearly labeled 'example') for the comparison — tactile paper object adds authenticity; film in natural home lighting; caption must include '$0 fees' and country-specific hashtags (#sendmoneyPhilippines #remittance #diaspora) to capture search traffic

organic-i-had-never-owned-bitcoin-in-my-.hook: I had never owned Bitcoin in my life. This took me 90 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Talking head — 'I always thought Bitcoin was complicated. I was wrong.' Beat 2 (6-30s): Real-time screen record of downloading Speed, creating account, and receiving first Bitcoin payment — clock overlay showing 90 seconds. Beat 3 (31-50s): 'No exchange, no seed phrase, no ID upload. Just a number someone sent me.' Show balance on screen. Beat 4 (51-60s): 'This is how I'd start if I were you. App's free, link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Screen record must be crisp — use iOS built-in recorder, clean up notifications before filming; overlay a stopwatch timer graphic for the '90 seconds' credibility hook; keep voiceover calm and conversational, not hype-y; post between 6-9pm local time for Reels algorithm boost

organic-the-us-has-200-000-bitcoin-you-c.hook: The US has 200,000 Bitcoin. You can own your first sat in 60 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Text on screen over slow zoom of Bitcoin graphic — 'The US government holds 200,000 BTC. Meanwhile most Americans own zero.' Beat 2 (7-25s): Quick education beat — 'You don't need to buy a whole coin. You can start with $1. Literally.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Screen record of Speed app, sending $1 worth of Bitcoin between two phones — emphasizes speed and simplicity. Beat 4 (46-60s): 'If institutions are stacking, maybe it's time you held your first sat. Speed app — free download.'
payload.production_notes: Use free stock footage of Capitol or government building for B-roll backdrop on beat 1; TikTok text overlay on dark background performs well for macro-stat hooks; avoid political commentary — keep framing purely financial; use #Bitcoin #Lightning #crypto hashtags plus trending #personalfinance tag

organic-bro-deposited-500-to-his-casino-.hook: Bro deposited $500 to his casino account in 3 seconds. No bank hold. No wait.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Talking head, energetic — 'My friend just deposited $500 to his gaming account faster than I can unlock my phone.' Beat 2 (6-25s): Screen record of Speed Lightning payment to a gaming wallet — timestamp visible, balance updates instantly. Beat 3 (26-45s): 'No 3-5 business days. No declined transactions. Bitcoin moves when you do.' Beat 4 (46-60s): 'Speed app — instant deposits, instant withdrawals. Link in bio.' Show app icon prominently.
payload.production_notes: Film the screen record on a second device while narrating on camera — cut between face and screen for pacing; keep gaming context implied not explicit to stay within platform content policies; '3 seconds' claim must be visually proven by the timestamp in the screen record; post Thursday-Sunday when iGaming intent peaks

paid-she-s-sending-300-home-47-of-it-van.hook: She's sending $300 home. $47 of it vanishes before her family sees a cent.
paid-she-s-sending-300-home-47-of-it-van.estimate: $1.80-$2.60 (below $3.17 benchmark — high emotional resonance + specific pain point + zero-fee proof point reduces friction to install)

payload.problem: Voiceover over footage of a woman on her phone: 'Every month, millions of families lose hundreds of dollars to transfer fees. Western Union, MoneyGram — they charge you to send your own money. $300 sent, $253 received. That's not a fee. That's theft.'
payload.solution: Cut to Speed app screen record: '$300 sent. $300 received. Fee: $0.' Voiceover: 'Speed uses Bitcoin Lightning — the fastest payment network on earth. Zero fees. Arrives in seconds. No account needed on the other end.'
payload.cta: Text on screen + voiceover: 'Download Speed. Send your first $0-fee transfer today.'
payload.audience: Meta — interest targeting: international money transfer, Western Union, MoneyGram, remittance, Filipino diaspora, Latin American diaspora, Nigerian diaspora; age 22-45; US geo

paid-i-own-bitcoin-i-set-it-up-in-90-sec.hook: I own Bitcoin. I set it up in 90 seconds. I didn't know what a wallet was.
paid-i-own-bitcoin-i-set-it-up-in-90-sec.estimate: $2.10-$2.90 (below benchmark — UGC format + '90 seconds' specificity + zero jargon reduces crypto anxiety install barrier; TikTok CPIs historically 15-25% below Meta for fintech curiosity segment)

payload.problem: UGC-style talking head, casual bedroom setting: 'Every time I tried to get into crypto it felt like I needed a computer science degree. Exchanges, seed phrases, gas fees — I gave up three times.' Authentic, slightly frustrated tone. Duration 4 seconds.
payload.solution: Screen record takes over: Speed app download, account creation, receiving $5 in Bitcoin from a friend — all under 90 seconds with clock overlay. Voiceover: 'Speed is just a number. Someone sends to your number. Bitcoin shows up. That's the whole thing. No exchange. No KYC. No confusion.'
payload.cta: Voiceover + animated text: 'Download Speed free. Own your first Bitcoin in 90 seconds.'
payload.audience: TikTok — interest targeting: personal finance, investing for beginners, crypto curious (engaged with crypto content but no crypto app installed), age 18-34, US; lookalike from Speed installer list

paid-your-withdrawal-is-processing-mine-.hook: Your withdrawal is 'processing.' Mine landed before you finished reading this.
paid-your-withdrawal-is-processing-mine-.estimate: $2.50-$3.50 (at or slightly above benchmark — iGaming audience is smaller and more competitive to reach; however high LTV of iGaming users justifies up to 1.5x benchmark CPI; creative split-test the split-screen vs. single-screen version to optimize down)

payload.problem: Split screen: left side shows a generic banking app with 'Withdrawal Pending — 3-5 business days' message. Right side shows Speed app with instant balance update. Voiceover: 'Every second your money sits in processing is a second you're not playing, not winning, not withdrawing on your terms.'
payload.solution: Speed app screen record — deposit to gaming wallet, timestamp shows 2.4 seconds. Voiceover: 'Speed runs on Bitcoin Lightning — the only payment rail fast enough to keep up with how you actually play. Instant in. Instant out. No holds. No limits on timing.'
payload.cta: Text overlay + voiceover: 'Download Speed. Deposit and withdraw instantly.'
payload.audience: Meta — interest targeting: online casino, sports betting, poker, crypto gambling, Bitcoin; age 21-45 male skew; US states where iGaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, CO, WV, CT); retarget website visitors who viewed deposit page
